summary: Hyunwoo Kang is focused on assembling a professional gaming team for the 6th scenario and reflects on the challenges of recruiting members. He successfully recruits Yuri and finally convinces Lee Hoon, also known as Heather, to join the team despite public controversy surrounding his past actions. Ultimately, Hyunwoo finalizes his roster, which surprises others due to its unconventional selection.
key_moments: Hyunwoo recruits Yuri to the pro gaming team.
Hyunwoo holds a persuasive conversation with Lee Hoon (Heather) to address his hesitations about joining the team.
The final team roster is completed and submitted, drawing reactions for being unexpected.
